name: Cheryl's Best Ever Sweet Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 8 white bread slices (or more, as needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix together cinnamon and sugar. Set aside.
3. Remove crust from the bread slices and roll them thin.
4. Blend together cream cheese, vanilla, egg yolks, and sugar in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture on the bread slices and roll them into logs.
6. Dip each log into melted butter, then roll in the cinnamon and sugar mixture.
7. Cut each log into 3 pieces and place on a cookie sheet.
8. Optionally, freeze the logs for later use. When ready to serve, thaw for 10 minutes before baking.
9. Bake at 350°F for 5-10 minutes.
10. Serve with sour cream for dipping.
